title: RavenHamsters Create Pack
description: A Create-focused modpack tailored for our private server.
body:
# RavenHamsters Create Pack

This modpack was created for use on our private Minecraft server.  
The main focus is on the **Create mod**, along with carefully selected additions to enhance the gameplay experience without losing the vanilla feel of Minecraft.  

Even though it’s tailored for our server, it can of course be played in singleplayer or used on other servers as well.  

## Features
- Main focus on **Create** and related mods  
- Customized for our private server’s needs  
- Easy installation through Modrinth or Prism Launcher  
- Selected mods for balance, stability, and fun gameplay  

## License
All included mods follow [Modrinth’s rules](https://modrinth.com/legal/rules).
